examples.title: Canny Edge Detection
examples.code:
ALGORITHM CannyEdgeDetection
BEGIN
  1. Apply Gaussian blur
  2. Compute intensity gradients (Sobel)
  3. Non-maximum suppression
  4. Apply hysteresis thresholding
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step pipeline for robust edge detection
examples.timeComplexity: O(nmk) for n×m image, k×k kernel
